resposta:
```python
class Solution:
    def pivotArray(self, nums: List[int], pivot: int) -> List[int]:
        less = [x for x in nums if x < pivot]
        equal = [x for x in nums if x == pivot]
        greater = [x for x in nums if x > pivot]
        return less + equal + greater
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution uses list comprehensions to separate the input array into three parts: elements less than the pivot, elements equal to the pivot, and elements greater than the pivot, then concatenates these parts to produce the rearranged array while maintaining the relative order of elements less than and greater than the pivot.
code:

        greater = [x for x in nums if x > pivot]
        return less + equal + greater
